mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND material_id = #{materialId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM material_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_favorite (material_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM material_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND material_id = #{materialId}
